title: #engineering thread on project atlas database migration
body:
Elena: Project Atlas migrates the primary Postgres cluster from version 12 to 16.
Chitra: Got it, thanks.
Kavya: Atlas migration owner is Asha, with Ben as secondary on-call.
Ines: Atlas uses logical replication to keep downtime under five minutes.
Grace: Got it, thanks.

title: #engineering thread on project atlas database migration
body:
Dmitri: Project Atlas migrates the primary Postgres cluster from version 12 to 16.
Asha: Atlas migration owner is Asha, with Ben as secondary on-call.
Kavya: The rollback plan for Atlas is to repoint the connection pooler at the old primary.

title: #engineering thread on project atlas database migration
body:
Jonas: The rollback plan for Atlas is to repoint the connection pooler at the old primary.
Asha: Makes sense to me.
Grace: The Atlas cutover is scheduled for the first weekend of August.
Chitra: Makes sense to me.
Farid: Atlas migration owner is Asha, with Ben as secondary on-call.
Grace: Got it, thanks.

title: #engineering thread on search latency optimization workstream
body:
Elena: The reranker stage adds about 80 milliseconds at the p95.
Hiro: Shard fan-out was reduced from 16 to 8 shards after the routing change.
Grace: Hiro is profiling the BM25 scorer for allocation churn.
Elena: I will follow up on this.

title: #engineering thread on search latency optimization workstream
body:
Ben: Shard fan-out was reduced from 16 to 8 shards after the routing change.
Dmitri: I will follow up on this.
Ben: Query embedding caching cut vector search latency by roughly 40 percent.
Ben: The reranker stage adds about 80 milliseconds at the p95.
Hiro: I will follow up on this.

body:

Jonas: Shard fan-out was reduced from 16 to 8 shards after the routing change.

title: #leadership-private thread on project hawk acquisition evaluation
body:

Kavya: Only leadership is briefed on Project Hawk until the term sheet is signed.
Ben: Adding it to the notes.
Grace: The Hawk decision meeting is set for July 30 with the board.

body:

title: #incident-response thread on sev1 payments outage postmortem
body:
Kavya: The payments outage was detected by the synthetic checkout probe, not by alerts on error rate.
Ines: Adding it to the notes.
Ben: Remediation includes adding a canary stage and connection pool alarms.
Ben: I will follow up on this.
Asha: Estimated revenue impact of the outage is 90 thousand dollars.

title: #incident-response thread on sev1 payments outage postmortem
body:
Ben: Root cause of the payments outage was a misconfigured connection pool limit after a deploy.
Asha: Estimated revenue impact of the outage is 90 thousand dollars.
Asha: I will follow up on this.
Ben: The June 12 payments outage lasted 47 minutes and affected 8 percent of checkouts.

title: #incident-response thread on sev1 payments outage postmortem
body:
Ines: The payments outage was detected by the synthetic checkout probe, not by alerts on error rate.
Jonas: Adding it to the notes.
Dmitri: Remediation includes adding a canary stage and connection pool alarms.
Grace: The June 12 payments outage lasted 47 minutes and affected 8 percent of checkouts.
Ben: Adding it to the notes.

body:

title: #general thread on paid time off policy
body:

Chitra: The company offers 25 days of paid time off per year plus public holidays.

title: #engineering thread on search ranking experiment results
body:
Asha: Next experiment is testing a distilled reranker to cut inference cost.
Chitra: Got it, thanks.
Farid: Kavya's query segmentation change reduced zero-result queries by a third.
Chitra: The cross encoder reranker improved click through rate by 6 percent in the online test.
Asha: I will follow up on this.

title: #engineering thread on search ranking experiment results
body:
Dmitri: The cross encoder reranker improved click through rate by 6 percent in the online test.
Kavya: The hybrid retrieval experiment improved NDCG at 10 by 12 percent over BM25 alone.
Ines: Adding it to the notes.
Jonas: Reciprocal rank fusion beat linear score interpolation in every offline test.

title: #engineering thread on search ranking experiment results
body:
Grace: Reciprocal rank fusion beat linear score interpolation in every offline test.
Farid: Adding it to the notes.
Kavya: Next experiment is testing a distilled reranker to cut inference cost.
Dmitri: The hybrid retrieval experiment improved NDCG at 10 by 12 percent over BM25 alone.
Ben: Adding it to the notes.
